request.name: OpenHands public GitHub activity QA scheduled 2026-05-16T12-31-13Z
request.prompt: Read-only scheduled QA automation. Every run, inspect public GitHub activity from the past hour across org:OpenHands public repositories. Use read-only GitHub API/search/MCP calls only. Summarize recent issues, pull requests, releases, and notable pushes if available in the run output/conversation. Do not post comments, open issues, push code, edit labels, or mutate GitHub or any repository state.
